::: {.aside .meta-note}
**META (v2):** Gallery lead, no header of its own; it hands from "how to read" into the tree walk. Node names match the site; order is top-down and slightly reordered from the site for readability (as in Post 2).
:::

What follows places the recurring figures on that tree, one branch at a time, walked top-down and in a slightly different order from the website. At each branch the question is the same: who lives here, and where do the people who share it nonetheless split?

Most worldviews are located, picking a branch and saying the danger is here. A few are distributional: they do not pick a branch so much as bet that the dangerous ones are nearly empty, and they attach to the branch they most deny.
